prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Pathfinder Golarion inspired epic political fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Draw an entire political fantasy world made of many irregular island chains and scattered landmasses, unevenly distributed across the page, in illustrated Pathfinder aged ink-on-parchment cartography. The islands must vary strongly in size and shape: broad nation-state islands, crescent desert islands, tiny reef specks, long mountain ridge islands, jungle archipelagos, frozen northern islands, volcanic god-war ruins, haunted necromantic isles, wizard academy rocks, harbor city islands, temple isles, pirate coves, and Pathfinder expedition outposts. Include multiple climates and biomes across the archipelago: temperate city-states, tropical jungles, snowy peaks, tundra, haunted swamps, arid deserts, volcanic badlands, grasslands, river deltas, storm coasts, and ancient magical wastelands. Coastlines on every major island should be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, shoals, and hidden coves. Make the island distribution asymmetrical and natural, with dense political clusters in some regions and wide dangerous seas elsewhere. Large detailed political fantasy atlas, subtle region tinting and expedition route symbols allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
